ddls:
CREATE TABLE "wells" (
  "well_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each well */,
  "well_name" TEXT /* Name of the well */,
  "field" TEXT /* Field where the well is located */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the well */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Type of the well */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Model of the well */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the well */,
  "drill_date" TEXT /* Date when the well was drilled */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date when the well was completed */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("well_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wells_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES well_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wells_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES well_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "well_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each well type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the well type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the well type */,
  "optimal_production_profile" TEXT /* Optimal production profile for the well type */,
  "maintenance_frequency" TEXT /* Recommended maintenance frequency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "well_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each well parameter */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the well parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the well parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_data" (
  "prod_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production data point */,
  "well_id" INTEGER /* ID of the well that the data belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of production */,
  "oil_rate" REAL /* Oil production rate */,
  "gas_rate" REAL /* Gas production rate */,
  "water_rate" REAL /* Water production rate */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Parameter ID */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the production data */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., sensor, manual input) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prod_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_data_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES well_parameters ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_data_well_id FOREIGN KEY ("well_id") REFERENCES wells ("well_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pressure_data" (
  "pres_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pressure data point */,
  "well_id" INTEGER /* ID of the well that the data belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of pressure measurement */,
  "bottom-hole_pressure" REAL /* Bottom-hole pressure */,
  "flow_rate" REAL /* Flow rate */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Parameter ID */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the pressure data */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., sensor, manual input) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pres_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pressure_data_well_id FOREIGN KEY ("well_id") REFERENCES wells ("well_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pressure_data_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES well_parameters ("param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conjpos" (
  "conjpos_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each CONJPOS data point */,
  "well_id" INTEGER /* ID of the well that the data belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of CONJPOS measurement */,
  "conjpos_value" REAL /* CONJPOS value */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Parameter ID */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the CONJPOS data */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., sensor, manual input) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conjpos_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conjpos_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES well_parameters ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conjpos_well_id FOREIGN KEY ("well_id") REFERENCES wells ("well_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coniapos" (
  "coniapos_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each CONIPOS data point */,
  "well_id" INTEGER /* ID of the well that the data belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of CONIPOS measurement */,
  "coniapos_value" REAL /* CONIPOS value */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Parameter ID */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the CONIPOS data */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., sensor, manual input) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coniapos_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coniapos_well_id FOREIGN KEY ("well_id") REFERENCES wells ("well_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coniapos_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES well_parameters ("param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "depths" (
  "depth_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each depth data point */,
  "well_id" INTEGER /* ID of the well that the data belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of depth measurement */,
  "depth_value" REAL /* Depth value */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Parameter ID */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the depth data */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., sensor, manual input) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("depth_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_depths_well_id FOREIGN KEY ("well_id") REFERENCES wells ("well_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_depths_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES well_parameters ("param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "swat" (
  "swat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each SWAT data point */,
  "well_id" INTEGER /* ID of the well that the data belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of SWAT measurement */,
  "swat_value" REAL /* SWAT value */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Parameter ID */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the SWAT data */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., sensor, manual input) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("swat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_swat_well_id FOREIGN KEY ("well_id") REFERENCES wells ("well_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_swat_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES well_parameters ("param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "well_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each well model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the well model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the well model */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, analyst, field operator) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "well_id" INTEGER /* ID of the well that the data belongs to */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser, device) used for access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Specific action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_well_id FOREIGN KEY ("well_id") REFERENCES wells ("well_id")
)
